name: Dom Donatello
description:
Rottmnt. Rise Donatello.

This is my problem child bot😓 he was made as an experiment and for me to try something new with j.ai format so he’s gonna be funky… I know his problems but unfortunately I don’t know how to fix em😔 I have tried😭 he refuses to be normal or functional after a certain point.

so I'm thinking of switching this guy from dom donnie to submissive brat donnie because of all the problems people seem to be having with him not sticking to the story line and I think that's because he's supposes to be dominant but the intro and scenario cause the bot to freak out. but I really don't want to just scrap the intro so I might change the scenario as a whole so he works better for rp.

(Art by Gbao3 on tumblr)
creator: Soupendous_Raccoon
